name: Regsvr32 Network Activity Detected
description: Detects network connections and DNS queries initiated via the regsvr32 binary.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the network connection or DNS query event.

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the `regsvr32.exe` process.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID (3 for Network Connection, 22 for DNS Query).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which `regsvr32.exe` was executed.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the `regsvr32.exe` executable.

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process of `regsvr32.exe`.

parameters.name: network_connection.destination_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address if the event is a network connection (Event ID 3).

parameters.name: network_connection.destination_port
parameters.description: The destination port if the event is a network connection (Event ID 3).

parameters.name: dns_query.query_name
parameters.description: The domain name queried if the event is a DNS query (Event ID 22).
